title: ctenitis melanochlamys
intro: Ctenitis melanochlamys, also known as Black Tree Fern, is a type of fern species native to East Asia, characterized by its dark green fronds and distinctive black stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. Ctenitis melanochlamys is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical applications, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
